readings.Aries: Your competitive instinct is firing at something that isn't actually a competition. The timing is better than it feels.
readings.Taurus: You accumulate experiences the way sediment accumulates — quietly, completely, permanently. Something small done consistently has more effect than something large done once.
readings.Gemini: There are two kinds of curiosity — the kind that opens doors and the kind that avoids commitment. Know which you're using. The week ahead rewards preparation you can still do today.
readings.Cancer: You've been managing your emotions rather than feeling them. There's a difference. Let this one be easy.
readings.Leo: You are at your best when you have something to offer. Today, what are you offering? The resistance you feel is pointing at something worth examining.
readings.Virgo: The system you've built is working. You are allowed to stop improving it for one day. The week ahead rewards preparation you can still do today.
readings.Libra: Something you've been weighing can only be decided by feeling, not analysis. The energy available today is better used gently.
readings.Scorpio: Someone is being more honest with you than you're comfortable with. The discomfort is useful. Small, deliberate, and patient — that's the mode today.
readings.Sagittarius: You are more certain than the situation warrants. A little less certainty opens more options. You already have what you need to take the next step.
readings.Capricorn: The coldness others perceive is not who you are. It is how you move through uncertain terrain. Let someone know. Someone you haven't thought of lately is relevant to this.
readings.Aquarius: There is an idea you've been developing privately that needs exposure to become real. Share it. Sleep on it before committing.
readings.Pisces: The distance between what you feel and what you say is large today. Try to close it. The first instinct was right.

Aries-Aries.synthesis: You give each other permission to be more yourselves. Sometimes that permission is exactly the problem.

Aries-Taurus.synthesis: Something transformative is possible here — if neither of you insists on doing it alone.

Aries-Gemini.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Cancer.synthesis: You want incompatible things from closeness. That tension is generative until it isn't.

Aries-Leo.synthesis: Neither of you knows how to be small around the other. Decide if that's exhilarating or just exhausting.

Aries-Virgo.synthesis: The slow materials and the fast energy can build something neither could alone. Patience is required from the fire.

Aries-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Scorpio.synthesis: One of you runs toward; one guards the door. The dance is interesting until someone gets tired.

Aries-Sagittarius.synthesis: Together you are louder, brighter, and harder to ignore. Whether that's what you need is a different question.

Aries-Capricorn.synthesis: The slow materials and the fast energy can build something neither could alone. Patience is required from the fire.

Aries-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Pisces.synthesis: The heat and the depth exist in real tension. That tension is the most honest thing between you.

Taurus-Taurus.synthesis: The practical language between you is fluent and efficient. The emotional one takes more effort from both.

Taurus-Gemini.synthesis: You complement each other in ways neither fully acknowledges. The acknowledgment is the missing piece.

Taurus-Cancer.synthesis: You offer each other what you each struggle most to give yourself: one of you offers ground, one of you offers feeling.

Taurus-Leo.synthesis: One of you wants to move before it's ready. One of you wants to wait until it's certain. Neither will be satisfied.

Taurus-Virgo.synthesis: You build things that last. The slower the construction, the less you talk about what might be missing.

Taurus-Libra.synthesis: Your different relationships with time are either the most useful thing about this or the most exhausting.

Taurus-Scorpio.synthesis: This tends to become quietly necessary to both people before either admits it.

Taurus-Sagittarius.synthesis: You work well when one agrees to be the foundation and the other agrees to be the spark. Agreement is the hard part.

Taurus-Capricorn.synthesis: You anchor each other well. Make sure neither of you has quietly agreed to stop moving entirely.

Taurus-Aquarius.synthesis: What you bring each other is exactly what the other struggles to generate alone. This should be easy. It isn't.

Taurus-Pisces.synthesis: One of you protects, one of you nourishes. At some point both of you need to be taken care of.

Gemini-Gemini.synthesis: You make each other sharper. You also make each other better at avoiding the things words can't fix.

Gemini-Cancer.synthesis: You each feel slightly alien to the other. That's either the draw or the obstacle. Often both.

Gemini-Leo.synthesis: You bring out ambition in each other. Whose ambition you're actually serving is a fair question.

Gemini-Virgo.synthesis: You each think the other is slightly impractical, and you're both right about each other, and wrong.

Gemini-Libra.synthesis: The conversation never stops. Decide if what you're talking around is more interesting than what you'd find if you arrived.

Gemini-Scorpio.synthesis: You each feel slightly alien to the other. That's either the draw or the obstacle. Often both.

Gemini-Sagittarius.synthesis: Something about this combination feels irresistible to both of you. That irresistibility is worth examining.

Gemini-Capricorn.synthesis: The ideas need grounding. The ground needs ideas. Neither of you finds this as obvious as it sounds.

Gemini-Aquarius.synthesis: The ideas between you breed more ideas. At some point one of them needs to become something real.

Gemini-Pisces.synthesis: The mismatch in how you process things is a feature in good times and a fault line in bad ones.

Cancer-Cancer.synthesis: Nobody outside this pairing fully understands what happens inside it. That's exactly how you want it.

Cancer-Leo.synthesis: The intensity is real. Whether it's connection or pressure depends on which day you're asking.

Cancer-Virgo.synthesis: You care for each other in ways that are practical and non-intrusive. Neither says much. Both notice everything.

Cancer-Libra.synthesis: You're both drawn to what the other has access to. Whether you can access it in each other is the question.

Cancer-Scorpio.synthesis: The emotional fluency here is extraordinary. The risk is drowning in it before finding solid ground.

Cancer-Sagittarius.synthesis: You are changed by proximity to each other. This is not neutral, and it was never going to be.

Cancer-Capricorn.synthesis: You offer each other what you each struggle most to give yourself: one of you offers ground, one of you offers feeling.

Cancer-Aquarius.synthesis: The mismatch in how you process things is a feature in good times and a fault line in bad ones.

Cancer-Pisces.synthesis: You absorb each other's moods completely. Make sure the current is flowing in a direction you chose.

Leo-Leo.synthesis: Together you are louder, brighter, and harder to ignore. Whether that's what you need is a different question.

Leo-Virgo.synthesis: One of you wants to move before it's ready. One of you wants to wait until it's certain. Neither will be satisfied.

Leo-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Scorpio.synthesis: You want incompatible things from closeness. That tension is generative until it isn't.

Leo-Sagittarius.synthesis: You recognised each other immediately. Whether that's good news depends entirely on what you recognised.

Leo-Capricorn.synthesis: One of you wants to move before it's ready. One of you wants to wait until it's certain. Neither will be satisfied.

Leo-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Pisces.synthesis: You challenge each other's default mode — which is either exactly what you needed or what you weren't ready for.

Virgo-Virgo.synthesis: You build things that last. The slower the construction, the less you talk about what might be missing.

Virgo-Libra.synthesis: The ideas need grounding. The ground needs ideas. Neither of you finds this as obvious as it sounds.

Virgo-Scorpio.synthesis: This tends to become quietly necessary to both people before either admits it.

Virgo-Sagittarius.synthesis: You work well when one agrees to be the foundation and the other agrees to be the spark. Agreement is the hard part.

Virgo-Capricorn.synthesis: The practical language between you is fluent and efficient. The emotional one takes more effort from both.

Virgo-Aquarius.synthesis: The ideas need grounding. The ground needs ideas. Neither of you finds this as obvious as it sounds.

Virgo-Pisces.synthesis: You care for each other in ways that are practical and non-intrusive. Neither says much. Both notice everything.

Libra-Libra.synthesis: You both live a little inside your heads. When you're together, the heads get very crowded.

Libra-Scorpio.synthesis: You're both drawn to what the other has access to. Whether you can access it in each other is the question.

Libra-Sagittarius.synthesis: You're both good at starting things. One of you will have to become better at finishing them.

Libra-Capricorn.synthesis: You each think the other is slightly impractical, and you're both right about each other, and wrong.

Libra-Aquarius.synthesis: You're rarely bored together. Occasionally you're frustrated by the inability to just be still.

Libra-Pisces.synthesis: You reach each other through completely different routes. The meeting place is interesting and unstable.

Scorpio-Scorpio.synthesis: You both know how to hold pain without speaking. Decide if that's strength or evasion.

Scorpio-Sagittarius.synthesis: You challenge each other's default mode — which is either exactly what you needed or what you weren't ready for.

Scorpio-Capricorn.synthesis: This tends to become quietly necessary to both people before either admits it.

Scorpio-Aquarius.synthesis: You're both drawn to what the other has access to. Whether you can access it in each other is the question.

Scorpio-Pisces.synthesis: Nobody outside this pairing fully understands what happens inside it. That's exactly how you want it.

Sagittarius-Sagittarius.synthesis: You give each other permission to be more yourselves. Sometimes that permission is exactly the problem.

Sagittarius-Capricorn.synthesis: The heat is useful when the earth channels it. The earth is useful when the fire can wait long enough.

Sagittarius-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Sagittarius-Pisces.synthesis: The intensity is real. Whether it's connection or pressure depends on which day you're asking.

Capricorn-Capricorn.synthesis: Reliability offered freely in both directions. What neither of you is good at is saying what you actually want.

Capricorn-Aquarius.synthesis: One of you is always explaining why it should move. One of you is quietly proving why it works as it is.

Capricorn-Pisces.synthesis: The foundation feels natural because it is. What gets built on top of it requires more deliberate attention.

Aquarius-Aquarius.synthesis: You make each other sharper. You also make each other better at avoiding the things words can't fix.

Aquarius-Pisces.synthesis: One of you explains. One of you feels. At some point the explaining stops helping.

Pisces-Pisces.synthesis: You both know how to hold pain without speaking. Decide if that's strength or evasion.

calculation_methods: Planetary longitudes: Jean Meeus 'Astronomical Algorithms' low-precision formulae (±1° accuracy)
Retrograde: computed from direction of longitude change vs previous day
Aspects: angular separation with standard orbs (conjunction 8°, sextile 6°, square/trine/opposition 8°, quincunx 3°)
Compatibility: element harmony base score + modality adjustment + date-seeded variance
Daily readings: deterministic date-seed (PRNG) selects from 60-entry per-sign pools + 30-entry suffix pool; 1,800 combinations per sign
